title: The Rawandiyyah Affair and How Abu Ja'far al -Mansur Dealt with Them
description: al-Mansur Dealt with Them According to the account given on the authority of `Ali b. Muhammad, the Rawandiyyah were a Khurasani group who fol285. The Riwandiyyah were a largely Khurasani group of proto - Shi'i Hishimis, linked to the eponymous ` Abdallah al-Rawandi, who acknowledged Muhammad b. 'Ali's succession from Abu Hishim b. Muhammad b. al-Hanafiyah and who through a belief in metempsychosis)tandsukh a1-arwdh) elevated Abu Ja'far alMan$ur to divine status. Cahen, " Points de vue "; Laoust, Schismes, 62; Hodgson, "Early Shi'a." 286.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 28
